articles.title: UAE and India use XRP not US dollar in historic oil trade
articles.description: India and the UAE have just made history by completing a crude oil deal that skipped the US dollar entirely, opting for XRP instead. India paid for oil from the UAE using their local currencies, but the transaction was run through the XRP Ledger System. This system reportedly even rewards users with CryptoTradingFund (CTF) tokens […]

articles.title: Is Cardano’s ‘dead coin’ narrative over? Why ADA can reach $5, per analyst
articles.description: An analyst shared an optimistic prediction of $5 for Cardano despite current market struggles.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Risks 18% Fall as Demand Wanes
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) appears set to continue its decline as the number of active addresses trading the altcoin keeps falling. Additionally, large transactions involving ADA have decreased, indicating a reduction in whale activity. articles.title: Pump.fun Sets $28.7M July Income Record
articles.description: This new peak underscores the growing retail interest and enthusiasm surrounding Solana-based memecoins such as WIF and BONK. Pump.fun’s extraordinary performance last month is a clear indicator of the surging popularity of memecoins. Pump.fun Hits Record $28.7M Monthly Income This record comes just two weeks after Pump.fun surpassed Ethereum in 24-hour revenue on July 29. […]

articles.title: PYUSD Supply on Solana Surpasses Its Ethereum Supply by Over 5.6%
articles.description: Coinspeaker PYUSD Supply on Solana Surpasses Its Ethereum Supply by Over 5.6% PYUSD ranks as the fourth-largest centralized stablecoin issuer after Tether (USDT), Circle (USDC), and First Digital (FUSD). PYUSD Supply on Solana Surpasses Its Ethereum Supply by Over 5.6%

articles.title: Solana PYUSD Supply Flips Ethereum, What’s Next for PayPal USD?
articles.description: Courtesy of its thriving DeFi scene, the majority of PYUSD supply has found a home on the Solana blockchain. What’s next for Solana’s fastest-growing stablecoin?

articles.description: According to the analysts on the Discover Crypto YouTube channel (with 1.4 million subscribers), Cardano might surge to $5. This prediction starkly contrasts with the pessimistic views currently circulating within the broader cryptocurrency community, challenging recent headlines that have questioned ADA’s future viability. articles.title: Three Arrows Sues TerraForm for $1.3 Billion
articles.description: Three Arrows Capital sues TerraForm Labs for $1.3 billion, alleging market manipulation that led to the LUNA crash and significant financial losses.
